objectType.title: Object Type
objectType.description: Type of record to search. Must be exactly one of: "Doctor" (searches Person Accounts), "Facility" (searches Business Accounts), or "OpenTasks" (returns open tasks for the running user).

searchFacility.title: Search Facility
searchFacility.description: Optional facility filter for Doctor lookups. When provided with objectType="Doctor", narrows results to doctors affiliated with this hospital or clinic via Doctor_Affiliation__c. Pass the bare facility name (e.g. "City Care Clinic"). Ignored for Facility and OpenTasks.

searchId.title: Search Id
searchId.description: Salesforce Record Id used as a filter. For objectType="OpenTasks": pass the doctor's Account Id (Person Account) to fetch tasks owned by the running user related to that doctor. Ignored for Doctor and Facility lookups.

searchName.title: Search Name
searchName.description: Primary search term. For objectType="Doctor": doctor's name only, with salutations like Dr./Mr./Mrs. stripped (e.g. "Mehta", "Sharma"). For objectType="Facility": hospital or clinic name (e.g. "Apollo Hospital", "City Care Clinic"). NEVER concatenate facility or phone into this field. Leave blank for objectType="OpenTasks".

searchPhone.title: Search Phone
searchPhone.description: Optional phone filter for Doctor lookups. Pass digits only (last 4 to 10) — strip "+", country code, spaces, dashes, parentheses before sending. Example: "9876543210" not "+91 98765-43210". Ignored for Facility and OpenTasks.
